description: Product Description BUDERMMY Trainer Socks Womens 3-5 6-8 Invisible Socks for Women Breathable Cotton Low Cut Socks Non-Slip No Show Socks Ladies Why You Choose BUDERMMY No Show Socks BUDERMMY invisible ankle socks are perfect gifts for women and girls. Give this to your friends, daughter, wife or anyone you love to show your love. Arch Support Reduce the pressure on the arch of your feet and keep your feet comfortable all the time. Breathable Mesh Design Designed with mesh in good breathability, these trainer no show socks will keep your feet dry and fresh all day. ﻿ good elasticity and durable Using a durable fabric weave,women's cushioned crew socks have increased elasticity which makes for a more comfortable fit. No-Slip Heel Grip That Stays Put Our silicone cushion strips lock socks in place from AM workouts to PM errands. Ultra-soft gel grips move with you – zero rubs, just cloud-like comfort that forgets it's even there. premium Combed Cotton Made of high quality combed cotton which has ultra air-permeability and moisture-wicking properties, making our socks soft and comfortable. comfort fit Premium cotton fabric keep you feet breathable and comfortable, offers great flexibility, durability and sweat-wicking. Non-Slip Trainer Socks Comfortable Socks Hidden Inside Your Shoes. Annoying to constantly pick up your socks on your heel when walking or running? Step Confidently in Hidden Comfort The silicone grips on the heel to ensure the socks stay on your feet the whole time. It's designed in a low cut style to be hidden inside your shoes and never sacrifice fashion for comfort. And suitable for various occasions, like parties/ business / daily / walking/ running.
